hypothesis: BootstrapFewShot on 50 Gan dev records improves schema validity and pragmatic category accuracy over the zero-shot ChainOfThought baseline (32% schema validity).
metric_caveats: Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
This config targets the fixed Gan synthetic validation split and must not be described as published Gan benchmark reproduction.
BootstrapFewShot demonstrations are drawn from the development split; ordering is deterministic by split assignment but DSPy bootstrap selection is not seeded.
